title: Fully Fullbright
description: A resourcepack which makes it brighter and lets you see in the dark
body:
# Fully Fullbright Resourcepack

Brings light into the darkness! This resourcepack ensures maximum brightness in Minecraft and is compatible with Vanilla, Sodium and Optifine.

Features:
- Full brightness: Always see everything clearly - even in caves and at night.
- Performant: Runs smoothly with Vanilla, Sodium and Optifine.
- Simple installation: Drag the file into the resourcepack directory and activate it in the game - done.

Ideal for anyone who wants to experience Minecraft in a brighter and clearer way without any mods or shaders.
